subcodes.first_line: The breath of God is passing by and the Word of God is being revealed. Blessed is he who hath found it and turned unto it with an illumined heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نسمه الله در مرور و کلمه الله در ظهور طوبی لمن وجدها و اقبل الیها بقلب منیر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat]
